hook.text: AMORIM CONFIRMED AT MILAN IN BOOST FOR UNITED

beats.text: MORETTO: DONE DEAL CONTRACT SIGNED UNTIL 2028
WHEELER: THE MOVE SAVES UNITED UP TO £10M
UNITED SACKED HIM IN JANUARY AFTER A POOR RUN

caption: Done deal — Ruben Amorim is the new AC Milan head coach. Journalist Simone Moretto confirms the contract runs until 2028 with an option for a third year. And there's a direct upside for United: Chris Wheeler of The Times reports the move will save Manchester United up to £10 million in compensation. Five months on from the sacking, all parties move forward. What do you make of Amorim going to Italy? 🔴 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #amorim #acmilan
